---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or incorrect information
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 📍 Location

- **File:** (e.g., `01-devops/04-ci-cd-pipelines/README.md`)
- **Section:** (e.g., "Hands-on Lab, Step 3")
- **Line:** (if applicable)

## 🔄 Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## 🌍 Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Tool version: [e.g., Terraform 1.5.0, Docker 24.0]
